name: {NICKNAME}
desc: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

1.name: Narrator of the Present
1.desc: Increases the CRIT Rate of ally targets with "Mem's Support" by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When an ally target has "Mem's Support," the effect of "Mem's Support" also applies to the target's memosprite/memomaster. This effect cannot stack.

2.name: Gleaner of the Past
2.desc: When ally memosprites (aside from Mem) take action, Trailblazer regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. This effect can trigger a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) per turn. The trigger count resets at the start of Trailblazer's turn.

3.name: Chanter of the Future
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Dancer of the Muse
4.desc: When an ally target with 0 Max Energy actively uses an ability, Mem can also gain <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> Charge, and the multiplier of the True DMG dealt by this target via "Mem's Support" additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Seamster of the Ode
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Bearer of the Revelation
6.desc: Ultimate's CRIT Rate is set at <unbreak>100%</unbreak>.

800701.name: Leave It to Me!
800701.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
800701.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

800702.name: I Choose You!
800702.desc: <u>Summons the memosprite</u> Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's Max HP, and grants Mem <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> Charge.
800702.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons the memosprite</u></color> Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP, and grants Mem <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

800703.name: Together, Mem!
800703.desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Mem. Grants Mem <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> Charge, then makes Mem deal Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK to all enemies.
800703.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons memosprite</u></color> Mem. Grants Mem <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>, then makes Mem deal massive Ice DMG to all enemies.

10000018.name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

800704.name: Almighty Companion
800704.desc: Memosprite Mem has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and a Max HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>. For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy regenerated by all allies in total, Mem gains 1% Charge.
800704.simple_desc: Every time <color=#f29e38ff>a certain amount of Energy is regenerated</color> by all allies, Mem gains <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>.

800706.name: Attack
800706.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

800707.name: Memories Back as Echoes
800707.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies within the Special Dimension are placed in a Time Stop state, halting all their actions.\nAfter entering battle against enemies afflicted with the Time Stop state, <u>delays the action</u> of all enemies by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and then deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Trailblazer's ATK.\nOnly 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
800707.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies in the dimension <color=#f29e38ff>cease actions</color>. When entering battle against enemies in the dimension, <u>delays the action</u> of all enemies and deals minor Ice DMG to all enemies.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

800708.name: Together, We Script Tomorrow!
800708.desc: Consumes 1 stack of "Epic" to dispel all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> on Mem. Trailblazer and Mem launch a <u>Joint ATK</u>, dealing Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK respectively. Then, Mem gains <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> Charge.
800708.simple_desc: Consumes 1 stack of "Epic" to dispel <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> on Mem. Trailblazer and Mem launch a <u>Joint ATK</u> and respectively deal Ice DMG to all enemies. Then, Mem gains Charge.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

10000019.name: Joint Attack
10000019.desc: Multiple targets respectively use attacks on enemy targets in one action.

800709.name: I Choose You!
800709.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons the memosprite</u></color> Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP, and grants Mem <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>.

1.point_desc: When the battle starts, Trailblazer's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When Mem is first summoned, grants Mem <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> Charge.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: When using "Baddies! Trouble!," Mem immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> Charge.

When the Max Energy of an ally target that has "Mem's Support" exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> excess Energy, additionally increases the multiplier of the <u>True DMG</u> dealt via "Mem's Support" by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

1.point_desc: After using Ultimate, gains 1 stack of "Epic," up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stacks. When this unit has "Epic" and Mem is on the field, Basic ATK gets enhanced to "Together, We Script Tomorrow!"

1800701.name: Baddies! Trouble!
1800701.desc: Deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK to one random enemy. At the end, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK to all enemies.
1800701.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG that Bounces a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). Deals minor Ice DMG to all enemies at the end.

1800703.name: Friends! Together!
1800703.desc: Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's CRIT DMG plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>.\nIf the Charge has yet to reach <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, Mem automatically uses "Baddies! Trouble!" when taking action. When the Charge reaches <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, Mem immediately takes action. In the next action, can select one ally and use "Lemme! Help You!".
1800703.simple_desc: Increases all allies' CRIT DMG.\nWhen taking action, automatically attacks. If the Charge reaches <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, then immediately takes action and can use a new ability: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Advances the action</u></color> of one ally and deals <color=#f29e38ff><u>True DMG</u></color>.

1800705.name: Go, Mem, Go!
1800705.desc: When Mem is summoned, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> Charge.

1800706.name: No... Regrets
1800706.desc: When Mem disappears, Trailblazer's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
1800706.simple_desc: Upon disappearing, <u>advances the action</u> of Trailblazer.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1800707.name: Lemme! Help You!
1800707.desc: <u>Advances the action</u> of one designated ally by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> and grants them "Mem's Support," lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nFor every 1 instance of DMG dealt by a target that has "Mem's Support," additionally deals 1 instance of <u>True DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.\nWhen using this ability on this unit, cannot trigger the <u>action advance</u> effect.
1800707.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Advances the action</u></color> of one ally and grants "Mem's Support": Additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><u>True DMG</u></color> after dealing DMG.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.
